info.title: DevPilot Local API Contract v1
info.description: Static OpenAPI contract synchronized with the secured-initial local FastAPI MVP. FUNC-SPRINT-68 adds token, restricted CORS, security headers and PolicyEngine binding.

servers.description: Future local-only server. Not active in Sprint 66.

get.description: Contract-only endpoint mapped to `WorkspaceApplicationService.status`. Sprint 67 implements this route in the local FastAPI MVP.
get.x-devpilot-policy: PolicyEngine bound by API_ROUTE_POLICIES; read/dry-run/plan-only only.

400.description: Invalid request envelope or unsupported parameter.

500.description: Controlled internal error preserving response envelope.

401.description: Missing or invalid local API token.

ErrorApplicationResponse.description: Error envelope preserving ApplicationResponse semantics. Non-2xx responses must still carry operation, exit_code and findings.

LocalTokenAuth.name: X-DevPilot-Token
LocalTokenAuth.description: FUNC-SPRINT-68 local session token. Use `python -m devpilot_core api token --json` and set DEVPILOT_API_TOKEN before serving.
